## Classification rules

| Class | Trigger |
| --- | --- |
| **big-loss** | Position worsened РЅЦ3 (with РЅЦ10 prior impr), OR impressions РЅц0.5x (with РЅЦ50 prior), OR clicks halved (with РЅЦ4 prior). |
| **disappeared** | Now 0 impressions, had РЅЦ5 clicks or РЅЦ50 impr last week. |
| **ctr-gap-opportunity** | Position 3РђЊ10, РЅЦ20 impressions, CTR < 1% Рђћ visible but not clicked. **Brann-Dailor-pattern**. |
| **big-win** | Position improved РЅЦ3, OR impressions РЅЦ2x, OR clicks 0РєњРЅЦ1 (with РЅЦ10 impr). |
| **new** | Did not appear last week, РЅЦ5 impressions this week. |
| **null** | Movement within the noise band. |
| **noise** | Below action threshold (e.g. new with <5 impr, gone but had <5 clicks). |
